extracted_json.title: Step 3 of the SPSP: Execute the plan

blocks.text: Step 3 of the SPSP : Execute the plan

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Step 3 of the SPSP: executing the plan by creating a structural map of an industry.
extracted_json.summary_gist: These notes cover Step 3 of the SPSP (executing the plan), beginning with Step 1: creating a structural map of an industry, illustrated with the Personal Computer Industry of the 1980s. The diagram maps the five-forces-style relationships among New entrants, Competitors, Suppliers, Buyers, and Substitutes, and lists example competitors in the PC industry: IBM, HP, Dell, and Apple.

transcription:
Step 3 of the SPSP : Execute the plan
   Step 1 :  Create a structural map ....
